B u i l d a n A I a g e n t th a t r e v i e w s J a v a c o d e a n d s u g g e s t s c l e a n - c o d e i m p r o v e m e n t s C r e a t e a M a d i s o n w o r k f l o w th a t e x p l a i n s w h i c h A W S s e r v i c e f i t s e a c h b a c k e n d t a s k B u i l d a n a g e n t th a t b r e a k s d o w n s y s t e m d e s i g n p r o b l e m s i n t o s m a l l b a c k e n d c o m p o n e n t s C r e a t e a w o r k f l o w th a t g e n e r a t e s a C I / C D c h e c k l i s t f o r J a v a b a c k e n d p r o j e c t s B u i l d a d e b u g g i n g a s s i s t a n t th a t r e a d s a n e r r o r a n d g i v e s p o s s i b l e r o o t c a u s e s a n d f i x e s T e c h S t a c k R e s e a r c h F r o m th e j o b d e s c r i p t i o n , th e r o l e f o c u s e s o n J a v a b a c k e n d d e v e l o p m e n t , A W S c l o u d s e r v i c e s , N o S Q L d a t a b a s e s , d i s t r i b u t e d s y s t e m s , m i c r o s e r v i c e s , C I / C D p i p e l i n e s , v e r s i o n c o n t r o l , t e s t i n g , d e b u g g i n g , a n d p r o d u c t i o n s u p p o r t . T h e s e t o o l s c o n n e c t d i r e c tl y t o b a c k e n d s o f t w a r e e n g i n e e r i n g w o r k a t A m a z o n . A m a z o n S D E I R e q u i r e m e n t s ↓ M y C u r r e n t S k i l l s ↓ S k i l l G a p s ↓ M a d i s o n P r o j e c t I d e a s T h e j o b d e s c r i p t i o n e m p h a s i z e s b a c k e n d r e l i a b i l i t y , t e s t i n g , o p e r a t i o n a l e x c e l l e n c e , a n d s c a l a b l e c l o u d i n f r a s t r u c t u r e , w h i c h a r e c r i t i c a l a r e a s f o r m o d e r n s o f t w a r e e n g i n e e r i n g r o l e s . P R D — P r o d u c t R e q u i r e m e n t s D o c u m e n t P r o d u c t N a m e : M a d i s o n B a c k e n d I n t e r v i e w P r e p A s s i s t a n t T a r g e t R o l e : A m a z o n S o f t w a r e D e v e l o p m e n t E n g i n e e r I G o a l : H e l p a b a c k e n d / S D E c a n d i d a t e c o n v e r t a r e a l j o b d e s c r i p t i o n i n t o a p e r s o n a l i z e d p r e p a r a t i o n p l a n . P r o b l e m S t a t e m e n t S t u d e n t s a n d e a r l y - c a r e e r s o f t w a r e e n g i n e e r s o f t e n s t r u g g l e t o p r e p a r e f o r b a c k e n d e n g i n e e r i n g r o l e s b e c a u s e j o b d e s c r i p t i o n s c o n t a i n m a n y t e c h n i c a l e x p e c t a t i o n s , s u c h a s J a v a , A W S , m i c r o s e r v i c e s , C I / C D , d e b u g g i n g , t e s t i n g , a n d p r o d u c t i o n s u p p o r t . T h e m a i n u s e r i s a s o f t w a r e e n g i n e e r i n g c a n d i d a t e p r e p a r i n g f o r a n A m a z o n S o f t w a r e D e v e l o p m e n t E n g i n e e r I r o l e . I f th i s p r o b l e m i s n o t s o l v e d , th e c a n d i d a t e m a y w a s t e t i m e s t u d y i n g r a n d o m t o p i c s , m i s s i m p o r t a n t j o b - s p e c i f i c s k i l l s , f e e l u n p r e p a r e d f o r i n t e r v i e w s , a n d f a i l t o s h o w a s t r o n g c o n n e c t i o n b e t w e e n th e i r s k i l l s a n d th e t a r g e t r o l e . P r o p o s e d S o l u t i o n I w i l l b u i l d a M a d i s o n - p o w e r e d A I w o r k f l o w th a t t a k e s a j o b d e s c r i p t i o n a s i n p u t a n d c r e a t e s a p e r s o n a l i z e d b a c k e n d i n t e r v i e w p r e p a r a t i o n p l a n . T h e w o r k f l o w w i l l a n a l y z e th e r o l e r e q u i r e m e n t s , c o m p a r e th e m w i th m y c u r r e n t s k i l l s , i d e n t i f y g a p s , a n d g e n e r a t e a w e e k l y s t u d y p l a n f o c u s e d o n J a v a , A W S , m i c r o s e r v i c e s , C I / C D , t e s t i n g , a n d d e b u g g i n g . M a d i s o n i s u s e f u l b e c a u s e m u l t i p l e A I a g e n t s c a n w o r k t o g e th e r . O n e a g e n t c a n a n a l y z e th e j o b d e s c r i p t i o n , a n o th e r c a n i d e n t i f y s k i l l g a p s , a n d a n o th e r c a n g e n e r a t e a r e a l i s t i c s t u d y p l a n . T h i s i s t e c h n i c a l l y i n t e r e s t i n g b e c a u s e i t c o m b i n e s j o b d e s c r i p t i o n a n a l y s i s , s k i l l m a p p i n g , w o r k f l o w a u t o m a t i o n , a n d A I - g e n e r a t e d r e c o m m e n d a t i o n s . U s e r S t o r i e s A s a S o f t w a r e D e v e l o p m e n t E n g i n e e r c a n d i d a t e , I w a n t t o u p l o a d a j o b d e s c r i p t i o n s o th a t I c a n a u t o m a t i c a l l y i d e n t i f y th e m o s t i m p o r t a n t b a c k e n d a n d c l o u d e n g i n e e r i n g s k i l l s r e q u i r e d f o r th e r o l e . A s a b a c k e n d d e v e l o p e r , I w a n t a n A I - p o w e r e d g a p a n a l y s i s s o th a t I c a n u n d e r s t a n d w h i c h t e c h n i c a l a r e a s s u c h a s J a v a , A W S , m i c r o s e r v i c e s , C I / C D , a n d d e b u g g i n g n e e d i m p r o v e m e n t b e f o r e i n t e r v i e w s . A s a s t u d e n t p r e p a r i n g f o r s o f t w a r e e n g i n e e r i n g i n t e r v i e w s , I w a n t a p e r s o n a l i z e d w e e k l y p r e p a r a t i o n r o a d m a p s o th a t I c a n s y s t e m a t i c a l l y i m p r o v e m y b a c k e n d d e v e l o p m e n t , c l o u d , a n d p r o b l e m - s o l v i n g s k i l l s i n a s t r u c t u r e d m a n n e r . S u c c e s s M e t r i c s R e d u c e t i m e s p e n t a n a l y z i n g a j o b d e s c r i p t i o n b y 5 0 % . G e n e r a t e a p e r s o n a l i z e d p r e p a r a t i o n p l a n i n u n d e r 2 m i n u t e s . I d e n t i f y a t l e a s t 5 r o l e - s p e c i f i c s k i l l g a p s f r o m th e j o b d e s c r i p t i o n . C r e a t e a w e e k l y p l a n c o v e r i n g J a v a , A W S , m i c r o s e r v i c e s , C I / C D , t e s t i n g , a n d d e b u g g i n g . M e a s u r e s u c c e s s b y c h e c k i n g w h e th e r th e u s e r c o m p l e t e s w e e k l y t a s k s a n d f e e l s m o r e p r e p a r e d f o r t e c h n i c a l i n t e r v i e w s I n d u s t r y s t u d i e s s h o w th a t s t r u c t u r e d i n t e r v i e w p r e p a r a t i o n

Part 2 – Data Documentation & Demo Project: Market Intelligence Agent Problem: Organizations need to monitor business trends, company updates, AI developments, and market intelligence from multiple sources. Manually tracking information from different websites is time- consuming and inefficient. This pipeline automates data collection and prepares structured market intelligence data for analysis. Data Collected Source 1: CNBC Business RSS  Type: Business and market news articles  Amount: 20 records  Purpose: Collect business trends, company news, and market updates  Collection Method: RSS Feed collected through n8n RSS Read node  Quality: 20/20 complete records Source 2: Amazon News RSS  Type: Corporate news, sustainability updates, AWS developments, community investments  Amount: 36 records  Purpose: Monitor Amazon business activities and technology initiatives  Collection Method: RSS Feed collected through n8n RSS Read node  Quality: 36/36 complete records Source 3: TechCrunch AI RSS  Type: Artificial Intelligence and technology news  Amount: 10 records  Purpose: Track AI trends, startups, cloud innovations, and emerging technologies  Collection Method: RSS Feed collected through n8n RSS Read node  Quality: 10/10 complete records Statistics  Total Records: 66  Clean Records: 66  Quality Rate: 100%  Sources: 3  Ready For: Assignment 4 analysis, trend identification, market intelligence reporting, and automated insight generation. Setup Guide Prerequisites Install: 1. n8n Desktop or n8n Cloud 2. Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets 3. Web Browser Workflow Setup Steps Step 1 Import workflow file: Pokale_Gayatri_A3_Workflow.json Step 2 Open workflow in n8n. Step 3 Verify RSS feed URLs: CNBC Business RSS: https://www.cnbc.com/id/10001147/device/rss/rss.html Amazon News RSS: https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/rss TechCrunch AI RSS: https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/feed/ Step 4 Click "Execute Workflow". Step 5 Verify records are collected from all three RSS sources. Step 6 Verify Merge node combines records successfully. Step 7 Verify Data Cleanup node generates final dataset. Step 8 Export data to CSV format. Access Requirements No API keys or passwords are required because all sources are public RSS feeds. Common Errors and Fixes Error: RSS Feed Not Loading Fix: Verify RSS URL is valid and accessible. Error: Merge Node Returns No Data Fix: Ensure all RSS nodes execute successfully before Merge node runs. Error: Workflow Takes Longer To Execute Fix: Reduce RSS feed size or execute workflow again after clearing previous executions. Error: CSV Export Missing Records Fix: Verify Data Cleanup node output before exporting.

pdf.text: Assignment 3 – Demo Walkthrough Market Intelligence Agent Screenshot 1 – Full Workflow Overview This screenshot shows the complete Market Intelligence Agent workflow developed in n8n. The workflow collects data from CNBC Business RSS, Amazon News RSS, and TechCrunch AI RSS before combining and cleaning the records for analysis. Screenshot 2 – CNBC Business RSS Configuration This RSS node is configured to collect business news, company announcements, and market updates from CNBC Business RSS. Screenshot 3 – Amazon News RSS Configuration This RSS node collects Amazon corporate updates, AWS developments, sustainability initiatives, and community investment news. Screenshot 4 – TechCrunch AI RSS Configuration This RSS node gathers artificial intelligence, startup, cloud computing, and emerging technology news from TechCrunch AI. Screenshot 5 – Merge Node Output The Merge node combines records collected from all RSS sources into a single dataset for downstream processing. Screenshot 6 – Data Cleanup Node Output The Data Cleanup node standardizes collected information by organizing fields such as source name, headline, date, category, and project metadata. Screenshot 7 – Final Dataset Output This screenshot displays the final Market Intelligence dataset exported to Excel. The dataset contains records collected from all three RSS sources and is ready for analysis in Assignment 4.

Mark et Int elligence Agent V2 Pr oblem Or ganizations spend 2- 3 hours daily manually tracking business tr ends acr oss multiple news sour ces. Ther e is no aut omat ed wa y t o prioritiz e which news r equir es immediat e business action. Step 1 — Complete n8n Workflow The complete workflow shows 11+ nodes running successfully. Data flows from 3 RSS sources through AI analysis, smart industry routing and personalized email delivery to 6 different business sectors. Step 2 — Groq AI Analyzing Articles The Market Intelligence Agent uses Groq AI (llama-3.1-8b-instant) to analyze each article. Output shows sentiment, urgency, key insights and recommended actions. Demo Walkthrough — Market Intelligence Agent V2 Gayatri Pokale — Assignment 4 — June 2026 Step 3 — HTML Report Generated A beautiful HTML report is automatically generated showing stats dashboard, high urgency alerts and full articles table with AI analysis badges. Step 4 — High Urgency Alerts Articles classified as high urgency are flagged in red alert cards with immediate recommended actions for business analysts. Step 5 — Email Delivered to Inbox The workflow automatically sends separate personalized emails for each business sector detected by the AI. Healthcare articles go to the Healthcare email, Tech articles go to the Tech email and so on. Each email has a unique colored header matching the sector. Step 6 — Smart Industry Routing, AI Decides the Sector The Switch node reads the AI-assigned sector field and automatically routes each article to the correct email: Healthcare → Healthcare Intelligence email Technology → Tech Intelligence email Retail → Retail Intelligence email Finance → Finance Intelligence email Legal → Legal Intelligence email General → General Intelligence email Step 7 — Personalized Sector Email Example Each sector receives a uniquely branded email report containing only articles relevant to their industry. The AI classification ensures complete personalization with zero manual effort required. Step 8 — Scale Testing Results Workflow tested at 10, 20, 50 and 100 articles. Successfully processes 20 articles with full AI analysis. Error handling catches rate limits gracefully. Key Points - Assignment 3 collected data — Assignment 4 understands AND routes it - AI makes ALL decisions — sector classification fully automated - 6 personalized email templates — one per business sector - Each team receives only relevant industry news - Smart routing based on AI classification — no hardcoding - Error handling ensures workflow never crashes - Costs $0.00 to run on Groq free tier - In production routes to different team email addresses
